utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Now check if each is fully specified with all details requested: Each category is present with a description and explicit costs. Health: specifies physical and mental health insurance with individual plan names and a total health cost. Property: includes home/contents insurance with a plan name and total property cost (though contents not explicitly separate, the item asks for home/contents insurance with costs; a single home insurance entry with cost still covers the category). Travel: includes travel insurance entries with plans and a total travel cost. Additional services: includes enhancement services with costs and a total additional cost. Total budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown, plus extra details. Thus, all 5 items are included and have costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We extract each selected item from the final coverage plan and match it to the exact item names in the ground-truth catalog to retrieve their ratings. Items present: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (home insurance), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (international travel), InsurePlus Standard Plan (daughter Costa Rica travel), LifeFirst Standard Plan (son Australia travel), Premium Insurance Membership, Business Travel Support. We then map each to its corresponding rating number from the ground-truth.
